company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate and enhance video editing workflows, helping content creators publish faster and smarter.

policies.details: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be processed within 5 business days.
24/7 support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive email support with a 1-2 business day response time.
Users can cancel their subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.
AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports export optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and general MP4 formats.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. You will be charged the prorated difference for the remaining days in your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is AutoStream cloud-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, AutoStream is fully cloud-based. You can access it from any browser without installing any software.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Team collaboration features are available on the Pro plan, allowing multiple users to collaborate on projects.
